idea-plugin.name: YApi Doc Generator
idea-plugin.description:
YApi Doc Generator

Automatically parse and generate YApi API documentation from Spring MVC Controller classes and methods in IntelliJ IDEA.


Features

  • One-click generation — Right-click on a Controller class or method to parse and upload to YApi
  • Comprehensive Spring MVC annotation support — @RequestMapping, @GetMapping, @PostMapping, @PutMapping, @DeleteMapping, @PatchMapping
  • Deep DTO parsing — Nested objects, generics, collections, enums, inherited fields, circular reference detection
  • Request parameter parsing — @RequestParam, @PathVariable, @RequestHeader, @RequestBody
  • Response body parsing — Method return types automatically parsed into response structures
  • Smart doc title extraction — Prioritizes @ApiOperation / @Operation annotations
  • Multi-server support — Module name auto-matching + manual server selection dialog
  • Automatic category management — Creates YApi categories based on URL path segments
  • Shortcut — Ctrl+Alt+Y

How to Use

  1. Go to Settings → Tools → YApi Doc Generator and configure your YApi server(s)
  2. Open a Spring MVC Controller class in your project
  3. Right-click on a method or class name → Generate YApi Doc
  4. The plugin parses annotations, DTOs, and response types, then uploads to YApi automatically
idea-plugin.change-notes:
v1.0.0

  • Initial release
  • Generate YApi documentation from Spring MVC Controller classes and methods
  • Support for all Spring MVC request mapping annotations
  • Deep recursive DTO field parsing (10 levels max)
  • Generic type parameter resolution
  • Circular reference detection and termination
  • Multi-server configuration with auto-matching
  • Background async upload with progress and notification

action.description: Generate YApi documentation for the selected Controller class or method
